title: IngestionOutcome
description: Single ingestion attempt outcome (accepted, rejected, duplicate) from the ingestion log

signal_id.description: Signal identifier (may be empty if missing from request)

source_system.description: Source system (may be empty if missing)

learner_reference.description: Learner reference (may be empty if missing)

received_at.description: When the ingestion attempt was processed (RFC3339)

rejection_reason.description: Present only when outcome is rejected
